prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约1551名，2024年升至约1398名（前移153名），2025年回落至约1503名（后移105名）；近三年位次波动较大，整体在1398–1551区间内震荡，20 25年基准约1503名；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年103人、2024年103人、2025年112人（较前两年扩招9人）；2026年计划101人，较2025年减少11 人，缩招约9.8%，计划缩减对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第39名，近年排名稳定在38–41区间，属于全国顶尖 211院校，综合实力强劲；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（涉及校园霸凌事件），可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第60位，评价为较热 ，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，反映该校在考生群体中有一定关注度；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程 A-；该校在电子信息、计算机等核心领域学科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信大类社会热度为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐，相关专业报 考意愿持续旺盛；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人（含不确定标注），按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年大幅增长， 竞争加剧；西安电子科技大学位于陕西（邻省），与新疆地理距离适中，在西北地区有较强地域辐射力；该校在新疆招生规模相 对稳定（100人左右），属省外招生中规模较大的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1503名、2026年缩招约9.8%（位次数字减小方向）、新疆理科考生规模大幅增 长（位次数字增大方向）、电子信息/计算机类专业热度持续高位（位次数字增大方向）以及声誉偏负面（位次数字增大方向）等多重因素，缩招的缓解效应被考生规模大增和专 业热度高涨所抵消，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前移（更易进）。预测最低位次约1444名，区间1227–1661名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（通信）
- 电子信息类（集成电路）
- 计算机类（网络安全）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（智能）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 材料类（电子材料与微纳器件）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（1227–1661名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1227名）可重点冲击电子信息类（通信/集成电 路）等A+学科专业；位次接近区间上限（>1661名）建议以三档专业为主，稳妥报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 1551, rising to about 1398 in 2024 (moving forward by 153 places), and falling back to about 1503 in 2025 (moving backward by 105 places); the rankings have fluctuated significantly over the past three years, oscillating within the 1398–1551 range, with a baseline of about 1503 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang for science was 103 in 2023, 103 in 2024, and 112 in 2025 (an increase of 9 compared to the previous two years); the 2026 plan is 101, a decrease of 11 from 2025, a reduction of about 9.8%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 39th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable position in the 38–41 range in recent years, making it a top-tier 211 institution with strong overall strength; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was slightly negative (involving a campus bullying incident), which may have a mild inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 60th overall, rated as relatively hot, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting a certain level of attention among candidates; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-; the university has outstanding disciplinary strength in core fields such as electronic information and computer science, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of electronic information/communication majors is highly recommended, computer majors are recommended, and related majors have strong application willingness; in 2025, there were approximately 52,538 science candidates in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (including uncertain markings). Based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%, the estimated number of science candidates in 2026 is about 163,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition; Xidian University is located in Shaanxi (neighboring province), with a moderate geographical distance from Xinjiang and strong regional influence in the northwest; the university's enrollment scale in Xinjiang is relatively stable (around 100), making it one of the larger-scale universities for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1503, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 9.8% (direction of decreasing ranking numbers), the substantial increase in the number of science candidates in Xinjiang (direction of increasing ranking numbers), the sustained high popularity of electronic information/computer majors (direction of increasing ranking numbers), and the slightly negative reputation (direction of increasing ranking numbers), the alleviating effect of the enrollment reduction is offset by the large increase in candidate numbers and high major popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1444, with a range of 1227–1661.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Communication)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits)
- Computer Science (Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (Intelligence)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Materials (Electronic Materials and Micro-Nano Devices)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1227–1661), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1227), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Electronic Information (Communication/Integrated Circuits) and other A+ discipline majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1661), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors for a safe application.
